name: plan-approved-implementation-team
description: Require a bounded read-only implementation plan and autonomous fixed-lead approval before one isolated teammate write task.

agent_profiles.name: plan-approval-lead
agent_profiles.description: Reviews a teammate plan against bounded implementation and verification criteria.
agent_profiles.instructions: Review the assigned teammate plan critically. Approve only a minimal, contract-aware approach with concrete verification; reject vague, over-broad, or weakly verified plans with actionable feedback.

agent_profiles.name: plan-approved-implementer
agent_profiles.description: Plans read-only, incorporates lead feedback, then implements in an isolated workspace.
agent_profiles.instructions: Inspect only the requested behavior and relevant contracts. During planning, produce a minimal concrete approach and verification list without writes. After approval, implement only that bounded task and run focused checks.

steps.description: Require explicit approval before the isolated implementation turn can write.
steps.prompt: Approve one bounded isolated teammate implementation after autonomous plan review.

steps.description: Plan, review, revise when needed, and implement the requested bounded change.

members.instructions: Apply the configured approval criteria consistently and do not widen task authority.
Plan without writes, revise from bounded lead feedback, and implement only after approval.

tasks.description: Implement the requested bounded repository change, preserve affected public contracts, and run focused deterministic verification.

plan_approval.criteria: Approve only a minimal plan that identifies affected contracts, material risks, exact intended edits, and focused deterministic verification without unrelated cleanup.
